---
title: "Final Project - Bayesian Implementation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Import Libaries & Read Data
```{r}
library(brms)
set.seed(42)

data <- read.csv('cleaned_data.csv')
target <- data[ , c(14)]  
head(data)
head(target)
```

## Select Features and Scale Data
```{r}
target <- factor(data[ , 14], levels = c("Menstrual", "Follicular", "Fertility", "Luteal"))

features <- data[ , -c(1, 14)]  
features_scaled <- scale(features)
head(features_scaled)

model_data <- data.frame(features_scaled, phase = target)
```

## Fit Model
```{r}
feature_cols <- colnames(features_scaled)
formula_str  <- paste("phase ~", paste(feature_cols, collapse = " + "))
cat("Formula:", formula_str, "\n")

prior <- default_prior(as.formula(formula_str),
                      data = model_data,
                      family = categorical("logit"))

# manual_prior <- c(prior(normal(4, 1), class = "Intercept"),
     #             prior(normal(0, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'sedentary_mins'),
#                  prior(normal(0, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'active_mins'),
#                   prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'glucose_mean'),
 #                 prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'rhr_mean'),
  #                prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'minutes_awake'),
   #               prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'minutes_asleep'),
    #              prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'sleep_efficiency'),
     #             prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'sleep_score_overall'),
      #            prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'sleep_score_revitalization'),
       #           prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'sleep_score_duration'),
        #          prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'lh'),
         #         prior(normal(1, 4), class = 'b', coef = 'estrogen')) 

manual_prior <- c(prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept", dpar = "muFollicular"),
                  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept", dpar = "muLuteal"),
                  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept", dpar = "muFertility"),

                  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", dpar = "muFollicular"),
                  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", dpar = "muLuteal"),
                  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", dpar = "muFertility"))

cycle_brm <- brm(
  formula = as.formula(formula_str),
  family  = categorical("logit"),
  data    = model_data,
  chains  = 4,
  iter    = 1000,
  warmup  = 180,
  prior = manual_prior)
```

## Diagnostics
```{r}
summary(cycle_brm)
```
```{r}
# plot(cycle_brm)
```

## Posterior Predictions
```{r}
phases <- levels(target)
post_probs <- posterior_epred(cycle_brm, newdata = model_data)
mean_probs <- apply(post_probs, c(2, 3), mean)
colnames(mean_probs) <- phases

predicted_phase <- phases[apply(mean_probs, 1, which.max)]
accuracy <- mean(predicted_phase == as.character(target))

cat("Accuracy:", round(accuracy, 3), "\n")
table(Predicted = predicted_phase, Actual = target)
```

```{r}
post_preds <- posterior_predict(cycle_brm)
head(post_preds)
```

## 
```{r}
fixef(cycle_brm)
```

## Conditional Effects
```{r}
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "lh", categorical = TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "estrogen", categorical = TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "glucose_mean", categorical = TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "rhr_mean", categorical = TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "active_mins", categorical = TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "sleep_efficiency_mean", categorical = TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(cycle_brm, "lh:estrogen", categorical = TRUE))

# ADDD CROSS VALIDATION
```

```{r}
summary(features$glucose_mean)
sd(features$glucose_mean)
```
